rationale: Braggadocious anthem about fame wealth and legacy with brief hints of substance use and inner struggle.
Soulful track uses a dog metaphor for messy self-aware vulnerability and effort to trust in love.
Confident duet asserting self-worth and cutting off inauthentic people amid embedded industry rivalry references.
Raw breakup ballad using alcohol and isolation to cope with heartbreak longing and self-destructive despair.
Passionate love song about lowering emotional guard and devoted loyalty amid romantic risk.
